title: astragalus newberryi
intro: Astragalus newberryi, also known as Newberry's milkvetch, is a perennial legume plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico, characterized by its white or pink flowers and small, brown seed pods. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus newberryi include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and alleviate symptoms of chronic diseases such as diabetes and cardiovascular disease. Astragalus newberryi is typically harvested for its roots and rhizomes, which are used to prepare herbal teas, capsules, and tinctures.
